description: A form of gang originating in Los Angeles, California, that spread to Central American countries including El Salvador, Honduras, and Guatemala. Maras have an organizational structure with a leader and sub-groups involved in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and other criminal activities. The term is generalized from Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) and also refers to the 18th Street Gang.

country_links.evidence_quote: which spread to Central American countries such as El Salvador , Honduras and Guatemala .
country_links.context: The maras have spread to and operate in El Salvador, where MS-13 and 18th Street are predominant.
